---
title: ""
subtitle: ""
author: ""
date: Jul 16, 2026
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-location: left
    code-fold: true
    code-tools: true
    theme: cosmo
    fig-width: 8
    fig-height: 5
execute:
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
library(tidyverse)

```

## Introduction


## Acquire


```{r}
#| label: acquire

```

## Wrangle


```{r}
#| label: wrangle

```

## Visualize


```{r}
#| label: visualize-1

```

## Communicate


## Conclusion
